secrets.description: Base URL of the Usernode block-explorer / node RPC. The /explorer-api proxy forwards getTransactions read-back here. Platform-managed in-network; this default is only used for standalone deploys.

Chain id segment the explorer expects in its transactions path (POST /<chain_id>/transactions). The /explorer-api proxy inserts it between NODE_RPC_URL and the sub-path. Leave unset to forward without a chain segment.
